title: store::drain: no LIMIT on SELECT loads entire offline queue into memory at once
description: store::drain() fetches all non-expired messages for a pub_id with a single SELECT and no LIMIT, then loads them all into a Vec<String> before sending any to the client. The enqueue cap is 1000 messages. At 1 MiB each (MAX_WS_MESSAGE_BYTES), a full drain loads 1 GiB into the relay process memory in a single operation before a single message is delivered. The fix is to stream or batch the drain, or to document the 1000-message × 1-MiB as an acceptable upper bound with a note that the cap should be reconsidered if MAX_WS_MESSAGE_BYTES grows.
